title: Auditor Verdict
description: Structured output schema for a single auditor subagent's post-code verdict. Consumed by phase-7b-leaf and phase-7a-epic orchestrator modules to decide retry/escalation.

agent.title: Auditor Agent Name
agent.description: The auditor agent that produced this verdict (e.g. 'architecture-auditor', 'security-auditor').

verdict.title: Verdict
verdict.description: The auditor's overall assessment. 'pass' means no issues; 'fail' means significant issues that must be addressed; 'escalate' means issues that require human intervention.

concerns.title: Concerns
concerns.description: List of issues the auditor identified. Empty array when verdict is 'pass'.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.description: List of suggested fixes or changes to address the concerns. Empty array when verdict is 'pass'.
